text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that allows computers to understand and process visual information, much like the human eye and brain. It involves technologies such as image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles to navigate safely. Other uses include facial recognition on smartphones and quality control in factories. As computer vision improves, it continues to change how we interact with technology.
